func GetRequestID(ctx context.Context) string

<a name="ErrorContext"></a>
## type [ErrorContext](<https://github.com/jbcom/secrets-sync/blob/main/pkg/context/error_context.go#L11-L20>)

ErrorContext contains structured metadata for error messages

```go
type ErrorContext struct {
    RequestID  string
    Operation  string
    Path       string
    SecretName string
    DurationMs int64
    RetryCount int
    StartedAt  time.Time
    FailedAt   time.Time
}
```

<a name="RequestContext"></a>
## type [RequestContext](<https://github.com/jbcom/secrets-sync/blob/main/pkg/context/request_context.go#L16-L19>)

RequestContext contains metadata for tracking operations across the pipeline

```go
type RequestContext struct {
    RequestID string
    StartTime time.Time
}
```

```go
func FromContext(ctx context.Context) *RequestContext
```

FromContext extracts the request context from context.Context Returns nil if no request context is found
